# dimensions()

**Instance Method**

Returns the representation’s dimensions.

## Declaration

```swift
func dimensions() -> CGSize
```

## Return Value

The representation’s dimensions.

## Discussion

If the representation doesn’t have valid dimensions, this method will return [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreGraphics/CGSizeZero].

## Getting Image Attributes

- **orientation()**: Returns the representation’s orientation.
- **scale()**: Returns the representation’s scale.
- **filename()**: Returns a string representing the filename of the representation on disk.

items.description: Returns a string representing the filename of the representation on disk.
items.name: filename()
